name: living-strategy-agent
description: Builds a living strategy agent that turns weekly trend signals into prioritized, repeatable marketing strategy briefs with a fixed section structure, strong specificity rules, and optional memory across weeks.
when_to_use: User wants an AI or workflow that monitors trends and recommends actions
User wants weekly or recurring marketing strategy briefs
User wants to automate or structure competitive intelligence into next steps
User describes struggling to keep up with market or cultural shifts

custom_sources_shape.description: Optional object with string arrays (and optional string notes): websites, usernames, competitors, communities, newsletters, keywords; notes string or list.
custom_sources_shape.source_scope: open | provided_only — whether custom_sources is priority-only or exclusive monitoring set for the run

brief_sections_in_order: Priority actions: Do immediately (48h), Do this week, Watch and hold
What NOT to do this week
deliverable_bundle_order: Working HTML prototype (when building an agent)
quality_bar: Named platforms and markets (no generic social advice)
When custom_sources provided: preserve source names (URLs, handles, communities, newsletters)
